models.label: Animated Goat Subagent

models.attributionText: "Animated Goat: 2 Texture Variants (Free Asset)" (https://skfb.ly/pGW7u) by 3D_Tech is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

notes: Production assets must be CC0/Public Domain or CC BY 4.0 and logged in ASSET_LICENSES.md.
CC BY 4.0 assets must include exact attribution in ASSET_LICENSES.md and CREDITS.md.
Primary sourcing targets: Quaternius, Kenney, Poly Haven, ambientCG; Sketchfab is allowed only for explicit CC BY 4.0 or CC0 assets.
If goat-subagent-animated.glb is present and includedInRepo is true, Office V5 should prefer it and fall back to goat-subagent.glb automatically.
If assets are missing, Office V5 falls back to procedural meshes.
